intro: Phebalium oldfieldii, also known as Oldfield's Phebalium, is a species of shrub native to eastern Australia. It has been traditionally used in herbal medicine for its purported health benefits, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties, which may aid in the treatment of various conditions such as wounds, fever, and respiratory infections.
